title: Moai Statue Paintings
description: adds Moai Statue paintings to Minecraft. You can choose 5 sizes: Normal, Medium, Big, Huge, and Gigantic.
body:
This mod adds a set of new, aesthetic paintings to your Minecraft world, featuring iconic Moai statues from Easter Island. Whether you're decorating a temple, a modern art gallery, or simply adding a unique touch to your home, these paintings will give your builds a new level of character.

The mod includes 5 distinct paintings, each available in different sizes to fit any space:

1x1

2x2

4x4

8x8

16x16 (A huge, high-resolution painting!)

Why you should download this project:

Unique Aesthetic: Move beyond the default paintings with a unique set of art that provides a striking visual for any build.

Perfect for Builders: The variety of sizes allows for seamless integration into large-scale projects or small, detailed rooms. The massive 16x16 size offers a dramatic, centerpiece-worthy piece of art.

Simple & Lightweight: This is a small, focused mod that won't disrupt your core gameplay, but adds significant creative potential.

Critical Information before you download:

Potential Performance Warning: The mod's largest paintings, especially the 16x16 version, use high-resolution textures. While they look great, they can cause performance issues or crashes on some systems, especially in combination with other major performance mods. If you experience crashes on startup, try removing the painting file or scaling it down to a smaller size.
